utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format consists of six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget (6 total). The final property solution includes all six items. Each item is fully detailed: the property section includes location, type, and price; financing includes lender, terms, rate, amortization, down payment, and monthly payment; legal_services includes provider, services, cost, and timeline; moving_services includes provider, services, special items, cost, and schedule; setup_services includes provider, services, cost, and timeline; total_budget includes a full cost breakdown. Therefore, all six items are covered and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a property for purchase in Toronto, Ontario, priced at CAD 800,000 within a CAD 700,000–850,000 budget. The moving service 'Premium Moving 001' corresponds to 'Premium Moving' (rating 9), as both indicate white-glove service and full packing/insurance.
